---
name: Phase Feedback
about: Provide feedback on a specific ESF phase definition
title: "[Phase X] "
labels: feedback
---

**Which phase?**
Phase number and name (e.g., Phase 3: Guess / Heuristics)

**What's the feedback?**
Describe what could be improved — unclear definitions, missing anti-patterns, impractical decision criteria, etc.

**Context**
What system or scenario prompted this feedback? (Optional but helpful)

**Suggested change**
If you have a specific improvement in mind, describe it here.
